name: Apple Streusel Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a plain New York type cheesecake.
2. Add apple pie spices such as cinnamon and nutmeg to taste.
3. Include diced fresh apples to taste (typically about two cups).
4. Prepare the streusel topping by mixing together butter, sugar, and flour.
5. Place the streusel on top of the cheesecake batter before baking according to the standard cheesecake recipe instructions.
6. Bake as directed for a plain cheesecake.
